title: dolichos formosanus var. rhombifolius
intro: Dolichos formosanus var. rhombifolius, also known as the Formosan dolichos or rhomb-leafed dolichos, is a variety of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are thought to contribute to its potential health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Dolichos formosanus var. rhombifolius may include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions. However, more research is needed to fully understand the effects and optimal uses of this plant for medicinal purposes.
